nodes.label: Command factory methods for creating command objects from parsed arguments.  Thi
Factory class for creating command objects from parsed arguments.
Initialize the command factory with specialized sub-factories.
Create JournalCommand from arguments (quest log view).
Create QuestsCommand from arguments (alias of journal).
Create QuestCommand from arguments (e.g. abandon <quest name>).
Create FleeCommand from arguments (no args needed).
Create TauntCommand from arguments (target NPC name).
Create NPCCommand for npc spawn subcommand (alias: /spawn -> npc spawn).
